properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When you feel the world is going down Your hope and future dreams turn around

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Don’t lose your faith Stand up and praise Let your faith arise And see His mighty power

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Victory is Yours! Victory is Yours! His word and power will prevail His promises will never fail Walk with faith and not by sight Your Victory is coming through

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Declare His promises in you He’s faithful to do it for you You will see all glorious things Receive Amazing Victory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nothing to fear, God’s there for you Nothing to fear, He’ll go with you Walk with faith and not by sight You’ll be victorious!
